entry.title: R.E.P.O v0.4.1
entry.content:
Mod: * fixed an issue with setting up the network handler * valuables in the hauler inventory now complete locations
This version will work with multiworlds from 0.4.0 and above.

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.1
entry.content: # Taskipelago/Taskipelabingo Version 0.9.1 Quick patch: * Allow sections to collapse on YAML generator for better editing on smaller screens * Fix issues with item/task balance counter * Added "Send Deathlink" button when deathlink is enabled. Use at your own risk, don't make your friends mad * Fix scrolling issue

entry.title: Astalon v0.99.2
entry.content:
- Fix using the GT1 elevator when starting at Gorgon Tomb - This is a mod-only fix, the apworld is the same as rc2
**More Information**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago/blob/astalon/worlds/astalon/docs/en_Astalon.md **Setup Guide**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago/blob/astalon/worlds/astalon/docs/setup_en.md **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago-Astalon/compare/v1.0.0-rc2...v1.0.0-rc3

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.0.0rc4
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is for testing only. generation problems and more beware. UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.0.0-Pre4)
- Added bulk boxes - Fix rules typo

entry.title: Crossword v0.0.0
entry.content:
Fixed archipelago.json to have missing field added generation option to include all cross letters
Docs now here: https://github.com/jm771/ap_crossword/blob/main/README.md

entry.title: Crossword v0.1.0
entry.content:
First AP world release. You need to source a .puz file containing the crossword you want to play. There's an excellent tool here for downloading one from your favourite crossword source.
https://github.com/thisisparker/xword-dl

entry.title: Paper Mario v0.6.5
entry.content:
## Bugfixes/Corrections
* Fix logic bug that could assume possible access to chapter 8 even though the required spirits were not obtained yet during `Required Spirits: Specific` and `Required Spirits: Specific_And_Limit_Chapter_Logic`. This could lead to impossible seeds.
## Other
* Implemented Archipelago procedure patching. From now on hosts generating a multiworld seed will no longer need to provide their own Paper Mario ROM. * Added `archipelago.json` file for AP version 0.7.0 compatability.

entry.title: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom v0.5.0
entry.content:
[Mod](https://github.com/soopercool101/YellowTaxiAP/releases/tag/v0.5.0) | [Setup Guide](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/blob/YTGV.v0.5.0/worlds/yellowtaxi/docs/setup_en.md)
## v0.5.0 - The "Finally Added a New Goal" Update
- Add three new levels with full logic: Arcade Panik, Pizza Time, and Tosla's Offices - Add Tosla's Offices boss as a new goal - New options: - DeathLink Amnesty: Allows you to send a deathlink on every Xth death, rather than every death - RingLink: Coins gained and lost are shared with other players with RingLink enabled - Remove Post-Goal Portals: Removes any portals that are after your goal portal from the game - Pizza Wheels: Allows shuffling of Pizza Wheels, with various options for how they affect the game - Purchase Rebate Percent: Allows earning more money after purchases are made - Chestsanity Percent and Coinbagsanity Percent: Matching Coinsanity Percent, these allow only some chests/coin bags to be locations rather than all - Coinsanity Nonfiller Cap: Allows adjustment of how many coins are forced filler, capped by host.yaml in multiworld games - Various Universal Tracker improvements - Support YAMLless generation, a YAML file is no longer necessary to track the game - Selecting a Yellow Taxi slot in the webhost will now ask if you want to launch Text Client or Universal Tracker - Location groups are now based on subarea rather than level - Added item groups, notably `Move` for `Progressive Boost` and `Progressive Jump` - Major logic changes

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.4
## Changes - Further small improvements to generation time; doesn't impact tracker logic but likely results in different item placement so trackers may get confused for old worlds but should still work. - Fixed a rare client side bug preventing sending goal. - Fixed a bug preventing the final floor of the final dungeon from sending atla locations.
Should work with old worlds. Games started on 0.5.2 will likely need to restart to continue, or have the server send the amount that were already received again with /send_multiple.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.6.3
entry.content:
Non-breaking logic changes made: We need to cook is now 1 region and requires: Warehouse access when randomized level unlocks, Meg Cooley or Jerry Montero if randomized customers and NOT randomized suppliers, Shirley watts if randomized suppliers
Locations for chemist now all only require warehouse access because chem station is no longer locked behind rank restriction.

entry.title: Suikapelago v1.1.0
entry.content:
New features: - Extra scoresanity checks, inserted between original scoresanity checks; 5-10 get one extra score check each (5-1 to 9-1), 10-15 get two each (10-1 to 14-2), and 15-20 get 3 extra each, for a total of 30 additional checks - Deep link support for the client (so you should be able to click the link on the webhost and be sent straight to the game) - A setting for initial cooldown - `shuffle_fruit_order` now also shuffles the fruit sizes by default
Bug fixes - Fixed a logic bug where Score threshold 20 would be considered sphere 1 by default

entry.title: Manual_FantasyLife_JBtheShadow v1.0.0
TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.0.0rc5
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is for testing only. generation problems and more beware. UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.0.0-Pre7)
- ordered options - small logic updates

entry.title: Metroid Fusion v1.22.4
entry.content:
## Changes
* Fix another longstanding logic issue expecting you to descend s2 without hi/space jump in a non-ponr yaml * Fix expected reverse access to charge core arena without morph (to kill the stabiliser) * Open the issues section on GitHub, set up two templates, and remove the three default templates * Fix a logic bug with boss immunity handling, mainly known to affect Nettori (@NPCPotPie) * Actually upload the right version this time 😅
Setup guide link: [here](https://github.com/StalledStorm/ArchipelagoMine/wiki/Metroid-Fusion-Setup-Guide)

entry.title: Muse Dash v1.5.33
entry.content:
# Changes - Update songs to Touhou Mugakudan -V-
# Installation ## Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
> You can find Muse Dash's folder by finding the game in your steam library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*.
### Windows 1. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.exe` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 3. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Linux 1. Navigate to Muse Dash on steam, open properties and add the following to Launch Options: `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="version=n,b" %command%` 2. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.Linux` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. - You may need to give it permissions to execute. 3. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 4. Click install. On first run, melonloader may install dotnet 6 in order to run. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Mod Install 1.Download `ArchipelagoMuseDash.zip`. 2. Head to the Muse Dash folder and open up `/mods/`. If this folder does not exist, run the game and it should appear. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. Ensure the files are not in a subfolder, this mod is not setup for that yet. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.7
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.7
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: UNBEATABLE Arcade v0.5.0a0
entry.content:
This is a very small update, adding the new songs from UNBEATABLE v1.10. Also, releases are now being handled by me, @estradiol-valerate, or Maya in the UNBEATABLE Discord thread linked at the bottom.
New songs: - small cloud sugar candy - apb
The client is **compatible** with v0.4.0 apworlds! You can update the mod even if you're currently in an async! The **apworld** is **NOT compatible** with v0.4.0 clients! If you generate a game with the v0.5.0 apworld, you must use the v0.5.0 client mod!
Check [the README](https://github.com/AllPoland/unbeatAP/blob/main/README.md) for installation instructions.
**Please read the YAML options carefully and test your options before joining a lobby**, since the pacing and difficulty of the apworld is very volatile. It's currently very easy to make a randomizer that is way too short or way too long.
Any feedback or ideas are welcome in the "UNBEATABLE (PC)" thread in `#future-game-design` in the [Archipelago Discord](https://discord.gg/8Z65BR2)!

entry.title: Spyro 2 v2.0.1rc1
entry.content:
This release modifies both the Duckstation client (S2AP.Desktop.exe) and the APWorld. You must update both to use this version.
This is a release candidate; it has been tested less than a full release, and feature are subject to change before the final release, which is expected in the near future.
New Features: - Music Shuffle option - Logic Changes around world warps, an option to remove the Professor’s door lock in Autumn Plains, and a new trick to get on the Autumn Plains wall with nothing (“Autumn Plains Wall with Hover”/`logic_ap_wall_hover`, added to easy difficulty and above), programmed by Phoenix - New options around Sparx powers - Lazy Sparx Trap
Changes - When trap chance > 0 but no traps are enabled, generation now proceeds with trap chance = 0 - [Duckstation] Added setup warning to disable runahead, which could overwrite cosmetic changes.
Bug Fixes - Fixed a bug where Sparx health upgrades obtained while not connected could desync max Sparx health - [Bizhawk] Fixed a bug where dragon shores token locations did not send when they were not required for the goal. - Fixed a bug that could corrupt cutscenes in a couple levels - Fixed a bug where Aquaria Tower sharks did not trigger deathlink - Fixed a bug where in gemsanity, 400/400 could flash on screen many times - Fixed a typo in a gemsanity option (thanks to Slumpymaster!)

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.4.0b0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Robot by @Fylcoast in https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/pull/84
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.3.2-beta...v0.4.0-beta

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.2
entry.content: Here we are ! Last pre-release before the real 2.0.0 ! (And a real complete changelog)

entry.title: Banjo Tooie v4.12.0
entry.content: # 4.12.0 - Huge thanks to Umed and the DK64 Crew (specifically the randomizer team), we now support a handful of emulators! - Tested emulators includes: - Project64 3.0.1 and 4.0 - Luna64 - Bizhawk 2.10 (companion lua script available to recover from Bizhawk Crashes) - RMG - Dpad-Up Banjo TipToe feature is now a ROM feature. - Review our [setup documentation](https://github.com/jjjj12212/Archipelago-BanjoTooie/blob/main/worlds/banjo_tooie/docs/setup_en.md) for recommended settings for the tested emulators.

entry.title: Suikapelago v1.1.1
entry.content: Fix deep link support.

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.4
entry.content:
# **Dark Souls Remastered Apworld & Client v0.1.4**
## More Goals, Multipliers, and Map Tracking
### Version update -> 0.1.4. Both apworld and client have updated. Client should be compatible with all 0.1.x generated apworlds.
## New features: * More `goal_condition`s! Ornstein & Smough, Manus. Added along with `After O+S` location group - to exclude if you're using the O+S goal; this will exclude all normally Post-Lordvessel checks. `/goalcheck` will tell you what your goal is. * Add `Soul Multiplier` and `Weight Multiplier` options - configurable via yaml option to be either be a static multiplier or require an option-defined number of "progressive" items to increase souls or reduce weight. Min/Max soul multipler is 20% to 500%, weight multiplier is 300% to 0%. Defaults are 100% for both and no such "progressive items". Soul multiplier changes via progressive item may not take effect until enemies are reloaded. * Tracker Map Auto Tabbing is available (and immediately available via Universal Tracker, using the Poptracker map pack). Controls also added to turn off sending this information from the client (e.g. for co-op). * Added `Item Lot Param` consistency check - should help catch issues if players didn't clean up their install after using a randomizer or other Param modifier (if they read the red error messages upon connect!)
## Fixes: * Send boss fogwall checks if their respective boss is killed without passing through it. You can now safely cheese the bosses (or try weird fog wall skips) * Bonfire warp items (mainly used for debugging) weren't working, and Catacombs and Chasm of the Abyss were swapped. Warning: these items are still not normally placed, nor considered for logic.

entry.title: HyperRogue v0.2.0
entry.content:
Version 0.2 is here!
You can now add extra locations for 10, 25 and 50 treasures in each land. To make up for these, filler items were introduced: Currently, an adjustable percentage of filler items are replaced by Orbs in your starting inventory. More Filler items hopefully soon to follow.
Also fixed two logic errors.

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.0
entry.content:
Here we go, finally caught up to the present day! # Known Issues - Flying Mantis is in the incorrect Region/Category (Savanna -> Turitopulis Forest [3]). # Changelog - **Added Chapter 5 Content.** - This also includes increasing the counts of some Cards since some have additional copies in Chapter 5. - Fixed some BUX not having I Spy Logic when they should've, mainly within Chapter 4. - **Tweaked the logic of some Checks to remove all instances of `{CanReachLocation()}`, to minimize gen time as much as possible.** - Added a Check for the Ankh Item that's in the Temple of the Red Sun. (@FNatFmaster) - There are now 60 BUX in the Item pool instead of 50, since the game now has that many as of DEMO 5. - Added a Check for the Pirate Spirit enemy that Trotter summons in his boss battle. - Added some missing Cutscenes and other Checks regarding Cruel King DX. - Added Levelsanity for Chapters 4 and 5 and adjusted the existing Levelsanity following FNaF's documentation. - This is subject to change depending on player feedback. - Actually fixed the Loyal Knight Check _for real_ this time. - I accidentally changed the Category but not the Region. - Added Finn McCool Content. (@FNatFmaster) - Related note: I finally beat him solo! Windforce is so good for him when you're alone, my god. - **Changed the logic of the Bizville BUX Shop. It now requires Chapter 4 to be completed along with the usual 50 BUX.** - As a result, the BUX Shop will not be part of the Multiworld unless PostGoal Content is active or Chapter 5/The Pit is your Goal. - Potentially a few other miscellaneous changes. # What's Still Missing? - Some of Chapter 4 and 5's Chatsanity. - Will likely add this in a patch when I have some more free time on my hands. - The BUX Shop in Chapter 5. - This won't be added until more updates to the game come out. May try to add it in DEMO 6, depending on how many BUX get added by then.
Thank you all for waiting for these last two major updates. It means a lot to me! I'm gonna go start my new job now and then take a nap, hope you all enjoy!

entry.title: Tyrian v1.0.5
entry.content:
This is a hotfix release, compatible with games generated with previous 1.0.x versions.
## Changelog
- Fixed not being able to connect to a game that was generated with shops disabled. - Fixed the world's smallest typo. (The C in "Zica SuperCharger" is actually supposed to be capitalized.)

entry.title: Refunct v1.2.0
entry.content:
# Version 1.2.0 - Memes and Fixes! Don't believe what the title says, there are no memes whatsoever. ## Additions - Funny Bridge Game Minigame: inspired by Squid Game, can you pick the correct tiles and survive the RNG bridge? The prize: 1 check! - Clique Minigame: you know Clique? An Archipelago game all about pressing a button! There is one free item on the ~~desk~~ platform, and then another item for pressing the button. But the button activation item needs to be found first! - Just Clique: tired of Refunct? Enable this option and the *entire* game will *just* be Clique! - Two "testing" levels are added: one "frogger" and one "beat block". You can find them when you are connected to any Refunct game. Check them out if you have time and let me know what you think and if you have ideas :3 ## Fixes - Deathlinks are only sent when the last one was at least 3 seconds ago. - Flowers that are forced into minigames are now correctly replaced by traps or english/latin names. - Incremented max number of minigames to 14.
Readme: https://github.com/spinerak/refunct-tas-archipelago/blob/master/README.md

entry.title: Refunct v1.2.1
entry.content:
### v1.2.0 -> v1.2.1 - Made flowers filler again (whoops)
# Version 1.1.x->1.2.0 - Memes and Fixes! Don't believe what the title says, there are no memes whatsoever. ## Additions - Funny Bridge Game Minigame: inspired by Squid Game, can you pick the correct tiles and survive the RNG bridge? The prize: 1 check! - Clique Minigame: you know Clique? An Archipelago game all about pressing a button! There is one free item on the ~~desk~~ platform, and then another item for pressing the button. But the button activation item needs to be found first! - Just Clique: tired of Refunct? Enable this option and the *entire* game will *just* be Clique! - Two "testing" levels are added: one "frogger" and one "beat block". You can find them when you are connected to any Refunct game. Check them out if you have time and let me know what you think and if you have ideas :3 ## Fixes - Deathlinks are only sent when the last one was at least 3 seconds ago. - Flowers that are forced into minigames are now correctly replaced by traps or english/latin names. - Incremented max number of minigames to 14.
Readme: https://github.com/spinerak/refunct-tas-archipelago/blob/master/README.md

entry.title: Crystal Project v0.16.0

author.name: Dragons but also Rabbits, FabulaFey, Emerassi

entry.content:
### **Crystal Project v. 0.16.0** <https://github.com/Emerassi/CrystalProjectAPWorld/releases>
### 🚨 AP World Update 🚨
New YAML Option EarnedItemInfoPercent, controls the percent of checks that must be collected to earn item into mode when ItemInfoMode is set to earned Various location accessability fixes
### 🚨 AP Mod Update 🚨 Fix for Sky Arena sending boss completion early when kill bosses is enabled Updated locations menu to show Ool icon for hinted checks if location is not in logic
### KNOWN ISSUES - Receiving a passive point cap increase does not update the available passive points until a passive is toggled on or off. - Mods that change the text scrolls (such as the intro in spawning meadows) may result in unexpected behaviour

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.1.0rc0
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is a stable version of the code. If this has no major issues it will be released soon.
reminder: UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.1.0-Candidate2)
- fix options creator - fix versioning issue - fix play tables name to id

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.12
entry.content:
Fixed black arks buildings not registering in sanity. Added new in-game hinting for sanity (have not tested in spheres mode).
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.11...v0.9.12

entry.title: Final Fantasy X v0.8.0
entry.content:
## FFX Apworld v0.8.0
### Feature - Generate randomized equipment per character (@Rurusachi) - Alternate goal condition - Nemesis (@Rurusachi) - Seymour equipment items & logic (@Andrewki44) - Hardcore Dream's End (@EvelynTSMG)
### Enhancement - Excluded locations no longer generate, and are instead local filler (@Rurusachi) - Separate superbosses option to allow for Omega Weapon without Dark Aeons (@Andrewki44)
### Bug Fixes - Fixed Nova & Mark of Conquest exclusion logic based on superbosses vs original arena bosses (@Andrewki44) - Fixed a logical issue with arena rewards logic not interacting with skipped locations correctly (@Andrewki44)

entry.title: Placid Plastic Duck Simulator v0.3.0
entry.content:
- [ApWorld] Added most DLC ducks - [Client] Removed text field character limits
# Note, installation has changed, please visit readme

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.0
entry.content:
BIG update for the project's 1st anniversary! Most notable additions are extra checks from item boxes and shortcuts - but these new locations would be nothing if they didn't include any proper filler items - that's why also "Random Item" at last is a thing (good bye "Nothing" item!). And hey, there are some traps for you too! And qol and bug fixes as well.
Big thank you for everybody who took part of testing the release candidates and reported bugs as well as good suggestions. Shout out to Matty Matt especially for doing some thorough testing. And Raze for working with the tracker pack!
As usual, download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/blob/main/docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## New Features * Boxsanity (single boxes or box groups as checks) * Shortcuts as locations * Random item as filler * Frantic items option * Guaranteed items (ensures you get an item if one is unlocked and fits your current position) * Progressive starting position item * Item rain traps * Overlapping start trap * Prevent extra characters if they are in starting inventory * Entrance info in hint info * Option for faster 50cc/100cc * All Cup Tour minimum rank and CC settings * Add ingame text for various things * GP Race Skips in cup selection screen * All Cup Tour requirements when ACT is selected (also accessible via `/unlocked`) * Current kart and characters with their upgrades/items in pause screen in GP * Good and staff times for current course in TT * Add Option Groups * Make custom lap counts editable in Options Creator ## Changes * Trophy requirement is now percentage based (to suit better randomized options) * Improve unlocked command visually * Increase the level expectation for staff ghosts * Raise caps for items and kart upgrades * Raise extra trophy max amount * Handle connection error gracefully (use `/error` to see the latest error) * **Using Gecko codes like widescreen hack is no longer supported** ## Fixes * Fix Dolphin cache problems * This has been the biggest headache for the longest time, but I think now I have found a good solution. The client tries to invalidate the cache in 3 places: when entering the main menu, when entering character menu and as a last resort when pausing the game. * Fix the fireball glitch again - hopefully for good now * Prevent checks in invalid state * The client won't give you checks for doing time trials when time trials are disabled, or other bad states like opening the client during a race. * A lot of little things
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v0.3.2...v1.0.0

entry.title: Crossword v0.0.0
entry.content:
Fix generation edge cases following fuzzing with https://github.com/Eijebong/Archipelago-fuzzer
Docs here: https://github.com/jm771/ap_crossword/blob/main/README.md

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.13.post2
entry.content:
Completely rewrote the .pack mod side of the archipelago and merged all 3 .packs together for ease of use. Fixed bug where checks only sent on connect and sanity checks didn't send. Fixed crash when loading a campaign.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.12...v0.9.13

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.0
entry.content:
# Changes from 0.8.5
## Additions
* Added support for **Botanics** (@CodeTriangle): * If enabled, acquiring all the information about each plant by collecting drops is a location. * Enable the `botanity` option to use this feature. * Along with this, you can also change how many plants are required to complete **Crocus Pocus** and the three intermediary locations. * Added support for the **A New Home** expansion (@kumquat-ir): * Chests, quests, cutscenes, and shops added by the DLC are all now available as potential locations. * Enable the `enable_dlc` option to use this feature. * A new goal has been added (`diorbis`) that requires the player to descend Ku'lero Temple.
# Changes from 0.9.0 Prerelease 3
## Fixes to Logic
* Added a requirement for **Azure Archipelago Pass** to **Trouble on the Highway**
## Additions
* Added **Cross Gear** shop slots to **Homestedt Weapons**.
# Migration Guide
This is the new stable version. All players should update to 0.9.0, regardless of whether their worlds were generated on 0.8 or a 0.9 prerelease.

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.1.0
entry.content:
Release 1.X.X is here!
New Features: - Achievements for card opening, selling, and grading - New Host.yaml options to limit and disable unwanted functionality - UT support - A redesign of the yaml - Card collection goal - New Deathlink - and so much more! check out [the docs](https://github.com/FyreDay/Archipelago-TCGCardShopSimulator/blob/main/worlds/tcg_card_shop_simulator/docs/en_TCG%20Card%20Shop%20SImulator.md)
This is compatible with any 1.1.X AP client. Find the Latest [AP client Here](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/latest)

entry.title: Dragon Warrior v1.0.5
entry.content: - Update some slot data for better autotracking capability (thanks to @kingdragonite55 for this!) - Patched the chest glitch to not occur (could cause checks in the Tantegel treasury to fail to send) - Minor text updates

entry.title: Minit v0.6.11
entry.content: some entrances that were randomized in ER but had rules on them (mostly just water entrances) never had the rules properly applied, this update just fixes that.

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.5
## Client Changes - Autobuild can now give most georama for current town! - River/Road/Bridge will require more work; there is a bunch of technical stuff I'm still working to understand - Pond/Oasis are a little odd currently in that they won't have water. Leaving/returning or just pick them up and put them back down and its fine. - Dran's Windmill and Parts HD also won't give their completion cutscenes without re-entering the town if the full building is placed all at once. - Fixed an obscure bug that could cause issues receiving items.
No .apworld changes made; works with older worlds/saves

entry.title: Chained Echoes v1.1.0
entry.content: - Added YAML options - Fixed two missing chests - Fixed some other issues with items and locations - Fixed compatibility with Universal Tracker

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.5
entry.content:
# **Dark Souls Remastered Apworld & Client v0.1.5**
## Bugfixes for auto map tabbing.
### Version update -> 0.1.5. Both apworld and client have updated. * Client is mostly compatible with all 0.1.x generated apworlds. * Auto Map Tabbing functionality between 0.1.4 and 0.1.5 is not compatible. As a result, if you update your client, apworld, or poptracker pack, please update all of them (to v0.1.5, v0.1.5, and v1.1.1 respectively)
## New features: * Auto map tabbing for the poptracker pack (requires poptracker pack v1.1.1 - found at https://github.com/routhken/Dark_Souls_Remastered_tracker/releases/tag/v1.1.1 ). ## Fixes: * For map tracking, Andre's now detected as being in UP instead of Upper UB.
## Special notes: * Map tracking in this version of the client and apworld requires newest poptracker pack due to changing indices. This includes tracking in Universal Tracker (which relies on the poptracker pack)

entry.title: Outward: Definitive Edition v0.2.2
entry.content: fix: no longer specify the max AP version in the APWorld manifest, so that it will work on newer versions of Archipelago

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.1
entry.content: ## Change log + Fix Memine completion

entry.title: Placid Plastic Duck Simulator v0.3.0
entry.content: - [Client] Fixed a bug that snuck passed preventing connection

entry.title: Crash2 v0.4.0rc2
entry.content:
I was thinking if this should be a full release, but ya whatever. It took an absurd amount of effort to get this to its current state.
Also make sure Emulation Settings > Runahead is disabled
## Gimmick Lock: - Option to lock certain level gimmicks behind an AP item, this includes: - Jetpack - Jetboard - Polar - Fireflies - Comes with customizable logic options
## Location Groups: - Credit: @seanstan95 - 56 location groups, which includes groups for each level, each warp room, each location type (crystal, clear gem, etc.) - 4 item groups - Not yet compatible with fruitsanity locations
## Bug Fixes: - Fixed many issues with deathlink - Fixed a logic bug where secret exits put the wrong secret entrance in logic - Fixed the client sending many warnings and sometimes crashing on connect
## Known Issues: - Respawning at the last checkpoint without Polar in each Polar level can result in a double-death - Going through a Polar/Jetpack level without Polar/Jetpack unlocked can sometimes just randomly crash the game for some reason (game doesn't like you or something)
### Note: - This version still has the same debug commands available from v0.4.0-pre
